ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable this option if you want to see product titles as they set in the products folder, instead of product titles you enter in a code block. For example, "apple 100" will be shown as "Apples 100" since the its file in the folder named "Apples.md".
ast.target: 如果你希望看到产品标题与 products 文件夹中设置的一致，而不是代码块中输入的标题，请启用此选项。例如，“apple 100”会显示为“Apples 100”，因为其文件位于名为“Apples.md”的文件夹中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, entries in the code block will be grouped by a title. For instance, "Apple 100" and "Apple 150" will be calculated as "Apple 250".
ast.target: 启用后，代码块中的条目将按标题分组。例如，“Apple 100”和“Apple 150”将计算为“Apple 250”。
